about.heading: Why Choose Us
body: Because we make your safety and hygiene our priority. At Sans Souci Ongles & Spa we take your health seriously: we keep three sanitation stations stocked with disinfectant, tools are sterilized after every use, and our manicure stations have dust collectors that protect both clients and staff.

Because we offer professional, exceptional service. With over 20 years of experience in nail care and beauty, our welcoming, professional technicians know how to deliver the high-quality results you're looking for, with satisfaction guaranteed.
Because at Sans Souci Ongles & Spa, you are family. Our team's warm welcome makes you feel right at home — every client is part of our extended family.

manicure.title: Manicure in Laval
manicure.heroAlt: Gel manicure with soft neutral polish at Sans Souci Ongles & Spa, Laval
intro: Treat your hands to a manicure at Sans Souci Ongles & Spa, inside CF Carrefour Laval. With more than 20 years of experience and over 1,000 gel colours to choose from, our technicians shape, smooth and finish your nails exactly the way you want — from a clean, natural look to bold nail art and full extensions.

We never rush. Every manicure follows a careful, unhurried process with premium products, because the difference between a good manicure and a great one is in the details: even cuticles, a flawless polish line and a finish that still looks fresh weeks later. Whether you're prepping for an event or simply treating yourself between errands at the mall, you'll leave with hands that feel cared for.
manicure.whyUs: Clients across Laval and Greater Montreal have trusted us for over two decades, and many have been coming since the very beginning. That loyalty comes from consistency: the same skilled technicians, the same high standards, and a warm welcome that makes every client feel like part of the family. Being right inside CF Carrefour Laval also means you can fit a manicure into a shopping trip, a lunch break or an evening out — no detour required.
included: Nail shaping and meticulous cuticle care
A warm hand soak, gentle exfoliation and a relaxing massage
Your choice of regular or gel finish
Access to more than 1,000 gel colours and finishes
A precise, long-wearing application that resists chips and lifting
Honest advice on the finish and shape that suit your lifestyle
addons: Nail extensions (gel or acrylic) for added length and strength
Custom nail art, French finish or seasonal designs
Paraffin hand treatment for deep hydration and softer skin
manicure.duration: About 45–60 minutes, depending on the finish and any add-ons.
manicure.aftercare: To keep your manicure looking its best, apply cuticle oil daily and wear gloves for cleaning or dishwashing — water and harsh detergents are the main cause of early chips and lifting. Gel finishes are touch-dry immediately, but regular polish needs a little patience in the first hour. When it's time for a change, book a proper removal rather than peeling: peeling takes the top layer of your natural nail with it.
manicure.hygiene: Your safety comes first. We keep three sanitation stations stocked with disinfectant, sterilize every tool after each use, and fit our manicure stations with dust collectors that protect both clients and staff. It's the standard that has made Sans Souci a trusted name in Laval for over 20 years.

faq.q: How long does a gel manicure last?
faq.a: A gel manicure typically lasts two to three weeks without chipping. We'll recommend the finish that best fits your routine and how quickly your nails grow.

faq.q: Do you do nail extensions?
faq.a: Yes. We offer gel and acrylic extensions to add length and strength, finished in any of our 1,000+ colours or with custom nail art tailored to you.

faq.q: What's the difference between gel and regular polish?
faq.a: Gel is cured under a lamp for a glossy, flexible finish that resists chips for two to three weeks; regular polish air-dries and is easier to change at home, but usually lasts only a few days. We'll recommend the finish that best fits your plans.

faq.q: Do I need an appointment?
faq.a: Walk-ins are welcome, but booking online or calling (450) 505-6450 guarantees your preferred time, especially on evenings and weekends when the mall is busiest.

manicure.metaTitle: Manicure in Laval | Sans Souci Ongles & Spa
manicure.metaDescription: Gel and classic manicures with 1000+ colours at CF Carrefour Laval. 20+ years of expertise. Book online or call (450) 505-6450 — from $50.

pedicure.title: Pedicure in Laval
pedicure.heroAlt: Relaxing spa pedicure in progress at Sans Souci Ongles & Spa, Laval
intro: Our spa pedicure is the ultimate reset for tired feet. At Sans Souci Ongles & Spa in CF Carrefour Laval, each pedicure pairs careful nail and skin care with a genuinely relaxing experience — a warm soak, gentle exfoliation and a massage that leaves your feet soft, smooth and rejuvenated.

It's more than polish. We take the time to address the things that make feet uncomfortable — rough heels, dry skin and overgrown cuticles — so you walk out feeling lighter, not just looking better. Add a paraffin treatment when you want to take the relaxation a step further, or gel polish when you want colour that lasts through sandal season.
pedicure.whyUs: Feet carry you all day, and they deserve real expertise. With more than 20 years caring for clients across Laval, our technicians know how to deliver a pedicure that's both therapeutic and relaxing — and they do it in a spotless, welcoming setting. Because we're inside CF Carrefour Laval, a spa pedicure is easy to work into your week, whether it's a solo treat or a visit with a friend.
included: A warm soak to soften skin and ease tension
Nail shaping and thorough cuticle care
Gentle exfoliation to remove rough, dry skin
A relaxing lower-leg and foot massage
Deep hydration and your choice of polish
Smoothing of calluses at the heels and pressure points
addons: Paraffin treatment for extra-soft, deeply hydrated skin
Gel polish for a longer-lasting, chip-resistant finish
Extra massage time to make it a true spa session
pedicure.aftercare: Moisturise your feet daily, especially the heels, and reapply after showering when skin absorbs best. If you chose gel polish, it's ready immediately; regular polish needs a little drying time, so wear open shoes to your car. Between visits, a pumice stone used gently in the shower keeps calluses from building back up — and booking every four to six weeks keeps feet healthy year-round.
pedicure.hygiene: We take hygiene seriously: three sanitation stations stocked with disinfectant, tools sterilized after every single use, and a spotless setup for every guest. It's the care that keeps Laval clients coming back for over 20 years.

faq.q: What makes a spa pedicure different?
faq.a: Beyond shaping and polish, a spa pedicure includes exfoliation, a relaxing massage and deep hydration — and you can add a paraffin treatment for even softer skin and extra comfort.

faq.q: Can I get gel polish on a pedicure?
faq.a: Yes. Gel polish keeps toes looking fresh for weeks and is a popular choice before vacations and sandal season, since it won't smudge on the way home.

faq.q: How often should I get a pedicure?
faq.a: Every four to six weeks keeps feet healthy and smooth, though many clients come more often in summer or before special occasions.

faq.q: Can you help with rough heels and calluses?
faq.a: Absolutely. Callus smoothing is part of our spa pedicure, and we can focus extra attention on problem areas so your feet feel comfortable, not just polished.

pedicure.metaTitle: Spa Pedicure in Laval | Sans Souci Ongles & Spa
pedicure.metaDescription: Relaxing spa pedicures with exfoliation, massage and paraffin at CF Carrefour Laval. 20+ years of expertise. Book online — from $40.

lash-extensions.title: Lash Extensions in Laval
lash-extensions.heroAlt: Close-up of natural-looking lash extensions applied at Sans Souci Ongles & Spa, Laval
intro: Wake up ready with lash extensions from Sans Souci Ongles & Spa at CF Carrefour Laval. We offer 2D, 3D and Hybrid sets, each tailored to your eye shape and the look you want — from a soft, natural enhancement to full, dramatic volume.

Great lashes are about more than length. Our technicians map the set to your eyes — adjusting curl, length and density across the lash line — so the result flatters your features and feels weightless. Careful, isolated application protects your natural lashes, which means your own lashes stay healthy while you enjoy fuller, darker lashes every morning with no mascara required.
lash-extensions.whyUs: Lash work demands patience and a steady hand, and that's exactly what 20+ years of experience brings. Clients across Laval choose us because we take the time to do it properly: a real consultation, a clean and controlled setup, and honest guidance on the style and refill schedule that will work for you. Inside CF Carrefour Laval, it's easy to keep your lashes full with a quick refill whenever you're nearby.
included: A consultation to choose the right style for your eyes
Your choice of 2D, 3D or Hybrid lash sets
Lightweight, comfortable, isolated application
Natural-looking length, curl and density
A look mapped to flatter your individual eye shape
Aftercare guidance to protect your lashes and extend wear
addons: Lash refills to maintain a full, fresh look
Extra volume for weddings and special occasions
lash-extensions.duration: About 60–120 minutes for a full set, depending on the style.
lash-extensions.aftercare: Keep lashes dry for the first 24 hours while the adhesive fully cures, then avoid oil-based cleansers and heavy rubbing, which break down the bond. Brush them gently each morning with a clean spoolie, sleep on your back or side rather than face-down, and skip waterproof mascara — it's hard to remove without pulling. A refill every two to three weeks keeps the set looking full as your natural lashes shed.
lash-extensions.hygiene: Eyes deserve extra care. We work in a clean, controlled setup with sterilized tools and disinfected stations, following the same strict standards that have earned our Laval salon its reputation over 20+ years.

faq.q: How long do lash extensions last?
faq.a: A full set lasts the natural growth cycle of your lashes — usually six to eight weeks. A refill every two to three weeks keeps them looking full as older lashes naturally shed.

faq.q: What's the difference between 2D, 3D and Hybrid?
faq.a: 2D and 3D refer to how many extensions are fanned onto each natural lash for added volume; Hybrid blends classic and volume techniques for a textured, natural-yet-full look.

faq.q: Will extensions damage my natural lashes?
faq.a: Applied correctly, they don't. Our technicians match the weight and length to your natural lashes and share aftercare so your own lashes stay healthy.

faq.q: Can I wear makeup with lash extensions?
faq.a: Yes, but skip oil-based products and waterproof mascara around the eyes. Most clients find they don't need eye makeup at all — that's part of the appeal.

lash-extensions.metaTitle: Lash Extensions in Laval | Sans Souci Ongles & Spa
lash-extensions.metaDescription: 2D, 3D and Hybrid lash extensions tailored to you at CF Carrefour Laval. Natural to dramatic. Book online — from $70.

waxing.title: Waxing in Laval
waxing.heroAlt: Calm, clean waxing treatment room at Sans Souci Ongles & Spa, Laval
intro: Smooth, comfortable and quick — our waxing service covers everything from eyebrow shaping to a full bikini wax. At Sans Souci Ongles & Spa in CF Carrefour Laval, our technique is designed to keep you as comfortable as possible for a fast, low-stress experience.

Waxing removes hair from the root, so results last far longer than shaving and the regrowth comes back softer and finer over time. Whether you want perfectly shaped brows, smooth legs for the summer or a tidy bikini line before a trip, our experienced technicians work efficiently and discreetly, so you're in and out without fuss.
waxing.whyUs: Waxing is as much about comfort and trust as technique, and that's where two decades of experience shows. Clients across Laval return to us because we're fast, gentle and genuinely discreet, in a clean and welcoming space. And because we're inside CF Carrefour Laval, keeping up a regular waxing routine is simple — pop in while you're already at the mall and walk out smooth.
included: Eyebrow shaping and facial waxing
Underarm, arm and full or half leg waxing
Bikini and full bikini (Brazilian) waxing
A technique focused on comfort and speed
Smooth results that last weeks, not days
Discreet, professional service in a private setting
addons: Brow tint to complete and define your shape
Combine multiple areas in one visit to save time
waxing.duration: From about 10 minutes (brows) to 45 minutes (larger areas).
waxing.aftercare: For the first 24–48 hours, avoid hot baths, saunas, swimming and direct sun, and skip heavy workouts — freshly waxed skin is sensitive. Wear loose clothing after a bikini or leg wax, and start gentle exfoliation after a couple of days to prevent ingrown hairs. Keeping the area moisturised between visits helps, and waxing on a regular four-week schedule makes each session quicker and more comfortable.
waxing.hygiene: We never compromise on cleanliness: disinfected stations, single-use applicators where appropriate, and tools sterilized after every use — the same strict standard across everything we do at Sans Souci.

faq.q: How long does waxing last?
faq.a: Most clients stay smooth for three to four weeks, since waxing removes hair from the root rather than the surface. With regular visits, regrowth becomes finer over time.

faq.q: How long should hair be before waxing?
faq.a: About a quarter-inch (roughly two to three weeks of growth) lets the wax grip properly for the cleanest, longest-lasting result.

faq.q: Is waxing painful?
faq.a: There's a brief sensation, but our technique is designed to minimize discomfort, and it eases noticeably with regular visits as the hair grows back finer.

faq.q: Can I wax if I have sensitive skin?
faq.a: Yes. Let us know in advance and we'll adapt the products and technique. We recommend avoiding sun and exfoliation right before your appointment.

waxing.metaTitle: Waxing in Laval | Sans Souci Ongles & Spa
waxing.metaDescription: Eyebrow to full-body waxing with a comfort-first technique at CF Carrefour Laval. Smooth results that last. Book online — from $15.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: Everything you need to know before your visit to Sans Souci Ongles & Spa.

items.q: Where is Sans Souci Ongles & Spa located?
items.a: We're inside CF Carrefour Laval at 3035 Boulevard le Carrefour, Entrée 6, Laval, QC H7T 1C8. Free mall parking is available at Entrance 6.

items.q: Do you take walk-ins or is it appointment only?
items.a: Both. We welcome walk-ins when chairs are open, but booking ahead guarantees your time and technician — especially evenings and weekends.

items.q: How do I book an appointment?
items.a: Book online any time through our appointments page, or call us at (450) 505-6450.
Manicures, pedicures, eyelash extensions, and waxing. See our services page for details and pricing.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept debit, major credit cards, and cash.
Our team serves you in French and English.
Yes — gift cards make a great present and can be purchased in-salon. Ask our front desk.

items.q: How long do gel nails and lash extensions last?
items.a: Gel manicures typically last 2–3 weeks; lash extensions last 3–4 weeks with proper care. We'll share aftercare tips at your visit.

Yes. We back our work with a 7-day guarantee. If something lifts, chips, or isn't done to standard, contact us within 7 days of your appointment and we'll fix the same shape, length, and design at no additional cost. Changes to design or color aren't included. See our Terms & Conditions for full details.

items.q: How do you keep your tools and stations clean?
items.a: We follow strict hygiene protocols. Tools are thoroughly cleaned and disinfected after every client and sterilized in a medical-grade autoclave that eliminates bacteria, viruses, and fungi. Disposable items are single-use, and every workstation is sanitized between appointments.

terms.heading: Terms & Conditions
intro: At Sans Souci Ongles & Spa (CF Carrefour Laval, Quebec), our goal is to give every client a relaxed, professional and high-quality experience. So that everything goes smoothly — and everyone is treated fairly — we invite you to read the policies below before your appointment. By booking with us, you accept these terms.
These policies apply to all services offered at Sans Souci Ongles & Spa and are governed by the laws of Quebec.

blocks.text: Booking an appointment is recommended to reserve the time and technician of your choice. Walk-in clients are welcome, subject to availability.
Please arrive 5 to 10 minutes before your appointment time for check-in.
A valid credit card or an Interac e-Transfer deposit may be required to confirm certain bookings (see Deposits below).
We respect your time, and we ask that you respect ours as well as that of our other clients.
If you expect to be late, please call or text us as early as possible.
Any lateness of more than 15 minutes may result in a shortened, modified or rescheduled service, at our discretion. In some cases, a partial cancellation fee may apply.
Out of respect for our team's schedule and income, we require at least 24 hours' notice for any cancellation or change to an appointment.
A cancellation or change made less than 24 hours before the appointment may incur a fee of up to 50% of the booked services.
A no-show without notice may be charged up to 100% of the booked services.

Group appointments, lash extensions, and long or multiple services may require a non-refundable deposit at the time of booking. The deposit is applied to the total at payment. If the appointment is missed or cancelled outside the notice period, the deposit may be retained.

Cancellation fees and deposits are communicated to you at the time of booking and appear on your confirmation, in accordance with Quebec consumer protection rules. A credit card may be kept on file solely to apply these fees, and is stored securely (see Privacy).
Prices are shown in Canadian dollars and are subject to applicable taxes (GST and QST).
The final price may vary depending on duration, customization, design complexity, repairs to existing work and the products used. Any surcharge will be communicated to you before the service begins.
We accept cash, Interac payment and major credit cards. Tips are appreciated but never required.
Payment is due at the end of the service. Any unpaid balance may be referred to a collection agency or pursued through civil action in Quebec (including Small Claims Court).
In accordance with the Consumer Protection Act (Quebec):

items: Our gift cards have no expiry date.
We charge no activation, inactivity or service fees on gift cards.
Gift cards are non-refundable. They are transferable and should be treated like cash — we cannot replace a lost, stolen or damaged card.
If the remaining balance on your card is $5 or less, you may request a cash refund of it at any time.

blocks.text: Your satisfaction matters to us. We invite every client to check the result before leaving the salon, so that any concern can be addressed right away.

If you notice a technical issue with your service after you leave, contact us within 7 days of your appointment so that we can assess the situation and, where appropriate, provide a complimentary fix.

Fixes cover technical defects related to the work performed (e.g. gel lifting, a missed spot, an uneven shape). They do not cover changes of preference, damage from daily life or poor at-home care, normal wear, allergic reactions to products used at home, or services performed by another salon.
What's covered

items: Lifting, chipping, or product-related issues
Fixes for the same shape, length, and design
Adjustments requested before curing under the lamp

blocks.text: How it works

items: Contact us within 7 days of your appointment
Corrections are scheduled based on availability
Changes in design or color are not included

blocks.text: Once a service is completed and accepted, it is considered final. Refunds are generally not offered on services rendered. Where a refund is legally required, it is issued to the original payment method.
Retail products may be returned unopened and unused within 7 days with the receipt.
Your safety and ours come first.

items: All our tools, equipment and surfaces are disinfected according to public health and industry standards.
Single-use instruments (files, buffer blocks, etc.) are discarded after each client.
Reusable metal instruments are sterilized in a medical-grade autoclave, which eliminates bacteria, viruses and fungi.
Workstations are sanitized between every appointment.

blocks.text: Proper sterilization and technique are essential for both your safety and the long-term health of your nails. Our goal is to provide a clean, controlled environment you can trust.
Please reschedule your appointment if you are unwell (fever, contagious illness, etc.) — at no charge, with reasonable notice.
If you have a medical condition, please let us know when booking or upon arrival so we can adapt the service safely. We are glad to welcome:

items: Clients who are diabetic, or who have circulation disorders or neuropathy. For your safety, we use gentle, non-cutting techniques (no blades or aggressive tools on calluses), and some steps may be modified or shortened. We do not perform cutting or aggressive callus removal on the feet of diabetic clients.
Pregnant clients. Some products or treatments may be substituted depending on your condition.
Clients with allergies, sensitive skin, or who have recently had cosmetic treatments (chemical peels, laser, retinoids, etc.). We will adjust the products used.
Clients with reduced mobility. Let us know your needs and we will do our best to accommodate you.

blocks.text: If you have an active skin or nail infection, an open wound, or a contagious condition in the area to be treated, we may need to reschedule that service for safety, and recommend that you consult a healthcare professional first.

Sans Souci Ongles & Spa does not discriminate against clients on any ground protected by the Quebec Charter of Human Rights and Freedoms or by Canadian law (race, colour, sex, gender identity or expression, pregnancy, sexual orientation, civil status, age, religion, political convictions, language, ethnic or national origin, social condition, or disability).
We do, however, reserve the right to change, reschedule or refuse a service when:

items: A client has an active contagious condition or an open wound in the area to be treated;
A service cannot be performed safely due to a known medical condition (in which case we will offer a suitable alternative where possible);
A client is intoxicated, disrespectful, harasses staff or clients, or creates an unsafe environment;
A client refuses to follow the basic hygiene or safety instructions given by our team.

blocks.text: We love welcoming younger guests for a nail service. For everyone's comfort and safety:

items: Children under 10 must be accompanied and supervised at all times by an adult.
Only the person receiving a service should be in the service area; accompanying children must remain in the reception area with their adult.
For safety reasons, running, climbing on chairs, and playing near workstations are not permitted.

blocks.text: Please keep an eye on your handbag, phone, jewellery and other valuables. The salon is not responsible for lost, stolen or damaged personal items.
This limitation does not apply to bodily injury or to damage caused by our intentional or gross fault, in accordance with the Civil Code of Quebec.
To preserve the salon's soothing atmosphere:

items: Please set your phone to silent or vibrate.
If you must take a call, please speak quietly or step near the entrance.
Hands-free use during the service is encouraged, so we can work safely (avoid handling your phone with fresh polish — we are not responsible for resulting smudges).

blocks.text: We collect only the personal information needed to provide our services and manage your appointments (name, contact details, service history, and where applicable a credit card kept on file for cancellation and no-show fees).
Your information is handled in accordance with the Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector (Law 25).
Credit card details kept for booking purposes are stored via a secure payment provider; we do not keep full card numbers on paper or in insecure systems.
You may request access to or correction of your information at any time by contacting the salon directly.
We will not share your information with third parties for marketing purposes without your consent. For more details, see our Privacy Policy.

Our salon is also a workplace. Our team has the right to work free from harassment, intimidation, discrimination and violence, in accordance with the Act respecting labour standards and the Charter of Human Rights and Freedoms. Any client whose behaviour compromises this environment may be asked to leave and charged for services already rendered.
Nail services (manicure, pedicure, gel, acrylic, extensions)
Nail enhancements are durable but not indestructible. Lifestyle, daily activities, exposure to chemicals or hot water, and at-home care all greatly affect how long they last.

Special shapes, custom nail art, elaborate designs, French, chrome, encapsulated designs and similar techniques may take more time and incur additional fees, which will be communicated to you before the service begins.
Our pedicure protocol uses gentle, professional exfoliation methods rather than blades or aggressive rasps. Significant calluses may require several visits for a better long-term result.
By booking a service at Sans Souci, you acknowledge and accept these safety-focused methods.
Lash extensions (if offered)
For quality and safety reasons, we may decline to do a fill on extensions applied at another salon. In that case, our technician will recommend a removal followed by a full new set.
Please arrive with clean lashes and no eye makeup.
Let us know of any allergy or sensitivity (lash glue, tape, cleansers).
Waxing and facials (if offered)
Please tell us about any skin sensitivity, allergy, recent cosmetic treatment (peel, retinoids, laser, Accutane within the last 6 months, etc.) and any medication that may affect the skin.
We may need to decline or adapt a service for safety reasons.

In accordance with the Charter of the French Language, all of our communications, signage and policies are available in French. Translations into English (and other languages where possible) are offered for your convenience. In the event of any discrepancy between versions, the French version prevails.
By booking and receiving services at Sans Souci Ongles & Spa, you acknowledge that you have read and accepted these policies.
We sincerely thank you for choosing us and look forward to taking care of you.
— The Sans Souci Ongles & Spa team

terms.updated: Last updated: May 21, 2026 · Version 1.1 — Sans Souci Ongles & Spa · CF Carrefour Laval, Laval (Quebec) · (450) 505-6450 · info@onglessanssouci.com

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Sans Souci Ongles & Spa (CF Carrefour Laval, Laval, Quebec) collects, uses and protects your personal information when you visit our website, book an appointment or receive our services. We handle your information in accordance with Quebec's Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector (Law 25).
By using our website or our services, you accept the practices described in this policy.

sections.heading: 1. Who is responsible for your information

blocks.text: Sans Souci Ongles & Spa is responsible for the personal information it holds. For any question about this policy or to exercise your rights, contact us at info@onglessanssouci.com or (450) 505-6450.
We collect only the information needed for the purposes described below:

items: Contact details: name, phone number and email address you provide when booking an appointment or sending a request through our contact form.
Appointment details: services booked, date and time, requested technician and service history.

Payment information: for certain bookings, a credit card may be kept on file to apply cancellation or no-show fees. This data is processed by a secure payment provider; we do not keep full card numbers.
Technical data: when you visit our site, limited data (device type, pages viewed) may be collected to operate and improve the site.

blocks.text: We use your personal information to:

items: Schedule, confirm and manage your appointments;
Provide our services and communicate with you about them;
Respond to requests sent through our contact form;
Apply our cancellation and no-show policies;
Meet our legal and accounting obligations.

blocks.text: We process your information based on your consent, the need to perform the service you request, and our legal obligations. You may withdraw your consent at any time, subject to information we must keep for legal reasons.
We do not sell your personal information and do not share it for marketing purposes without your consent.

We may share certain information with service providers who help us operate our business (for example, our online booking platform and our payment provider), only to the extent necessary to deliver their services and under appropriate confidentiality commitments.

sections.heading: 6. How long we keep your information

blocks.text: We keep your personal information for as long as necessary for the purposes for which it was collected, or as long as required by applicable law (for example, tax and accounting obligations). When it is no longer needed, it is securely destroyed or anonymized.

We put in place reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your information against unauthorized access, use or disclosure. Payment information is processed by providers that comply with industry standards.
Under Law 25, you have the right to:

items: Access the personal information we hold about you;
Request the correction of inaccurate or incomplete information;
Withdraw your consent to its use, subject to legal obligations;
File a complaint with the Commission d'accès à l'information du Québec.

blocks.text: To exercise these rights, contact us at info@onglessanssouci.com.

Our site may use cookies that are essential to the proper functioning of the site and, where applicable, audience-measurement cookies to understand how our site is used. You can manage cookies in your browser settings; disabling certain cookies may limit functionality.
We may update this policy from time to time. The most recent version is always published on this page, with its update date.
In accordance with the Charter of the French Language, this policy is available in French. Translations are offered for your convenience; in the event of any discrepancy, the French version prevails.

privacy.updated: Last updated: May 8, 2026 — Sans Souci Ongles & Spa · CF Carrefour Laval, Laval (Quebec) · (450) 505-6450 · info@onglessanssouci.com

gel-vs-regular.title: Gel vs Regular Polish: Which to Choose in Laval?
gel-vs-regular.metaTitle: Gel vs Regular Polish: Which Lasts Longer? · Laval
gel-vs-regular.metaDescription: Gel or classic polish? Compare wear, shine and removal at Sans Souci Ongles & Spa inside Carrefour Laval mall.
intro: Choosing between gel and regular nail polish is one of the most common questions before a manicure appointment. Both have their strengths depending on your lifestyle, how often you visit the salon, and the finish you want.

At Sans Souci Ongles & Spa, inside CF Carrefour Laval, our experienced nail technicians have been guiding clients to the right choice for over 20 years — and we offer both gel and classic polish services.
gel-vs-regular.verdict: If you want a manicure that withstands daily tasks and stays glossy for weeks, gel or shellac is the superior choice. If you love switching colours often and prefer quick at-home removal, classic polish is a great option. Our nail technicians at Sans Souci Ongles & Spa are happy to recommend the best formula based on your nail health and lifestyle.

faq.q: Does gel polish damage your nails?
faq.a: Proper application and professional removal keep damage to a minimum. Our technicians take care of your natural nails at every step of the process.

faq.q: How long does a gel manicure last at Sans Souci?
faq.a: On average 2 to 3 weeks, depending on nail growth and your daily activities.

faq.q: Can I remove gel polish at home?
faq.a: We recommend professional removal to avoid damaging the nail plate. We offer a removal service at the salon.

faq.q: Do gel and regular manicures cost the same?
faq.a: No — gel requires a more involved technique. Our prices reflect application time and products used. Call us at (450) 505-6450 for current pricing.

lash-styles.title: Lash Extensions 2D vs 3D vs Hybrid: Your Laval Guide
lash-styles.metaTitle: Lash Extensions 2D vs 3D vs Hybrid · Laval
lash-styles.metaDescription: Compare 2D, 3D and Hybrid lash extension styles at Sans Souci Ongles & Spa inside Carrefour Laval to find your perfect look.
intro: Classic, volume, or hybrid lash extensions — each style delivers a different result, from barely-there to full and dramatic. Understanding the differences before your appointment helps you arrive with clear expectations and leave with the look you love.
At Sans Souci Ongles & Spa in CF Carrefour Laval, our certified lash technicians master all three styles — 2D, 3D, and Hybrid — and customize every set to your eye shape and desired effect.
lash-styles.verdict: The 2D classic style is ideal for those who want defined lashes without an over-the-top effect — perfect for everyday wear. The 3D volume set creates impressive fullness for special occasions or for clients who love a dramatic look. Hybrid offers the best of both worlds. All lash extension services at Sans Souci Ongles & Spa are performed by certified technicians using high-quality materials for safe, long-lasting results.

faq.q: What is the difference between 2D and 3D volume lashes?
faq.a: 2D classic involves applying one or two synthetic lashes per natural lash for a defined look. 3D volume uses fans of three ultra-fine lashes per natural lash for maximum density and drama.

faq.q: Will lash extensions damage my natural lashes?
faq.a: When applied and maintained correctly, extensions do not harm natural lashes. Our technicians follow strict isolation and adhesive protocols for safe application.

faq.q: How long do lash extensions last before a fill?
faq.a: Most clients come in for a fill every 2 to 3 weeks, depending on their natural lash growth cycle and aftercare routine.

faq.q: Can I wear mascara with lash extensions?
faq.a: We recommend avoiding mascara, especially waterproof formulas, and oil-based eye products, as these can break down the adhesive bond.

wax-vs-sugar.title: Waxing vs Sugaring: Key Differences to Know in Laval
wax-vs-sugar.metaTitle: Waxing vs Sugaring: Which Method? · Laval
wax-vs-sugar.metaDescription: Compare waxing and sugaring hair removal, and book professional waxing at Sans Souci Ongles & Spa inside Carrefour Laval.
intro: Waxing and sugaring are both popular methods for removing unwanted hair, but they differ in composition, application technique, and how they interact with the skin. Knowing these differences helps you make an informed decision.
At Sans Souci Ongles & Spa inside CF Carrefour Laval, we offer professional waxing performed by experienced technicians. Our service combines effectiveness, precision, and comfort for all skin types.
wax-vs-sugar.verdict: Both waxing and sugaring deliver comparable results in terms of longevity and smoothness. Sugaring, made from sugar, water, and lemon juice, is praised for its natural formula and gentleness on sensitive skin. Professional waxing is a time-tested method effective on all body areas. At Sans Souci Ongles & Spa, we offer professional waxing services using quality products, applied by experienced technicians. To book your appointment or learn more, call us at (450) 505-6450.

faq.q: What is the main difference between waxing and sugaring?
faq.a: Wax is made from resins and can be applied warm or cold, while sugaring uses a paste of sugar, water, and lemon juice at room temperature. Both remove hair from the root.

faq.q: Is waxing painful?
faq.a: Mild discomfort is normal, but our technicians work quickly using techniques that minimize pain. Skin typically becomes less sensitive with regular appointments.

faq.q: How long does hair need to be before waxing?
faq.a: Hair should be approximately 3 to 5 mm long (about 2 weeks of growth) for effective wax hair removal.

faq.q: Do you offer sugaring at Sans Souci?
faq.a: No — we offer professional waxing only. It is an effective, proven method our technicians have perfected over more than 20 years of experience.
